import pytest
from appium.webdriver.common.appiumby import AppiumBy
from reportportal_client import step

from driver.driver_actions import DriverActions


@pytest.mark.name("test_case")
def test_test_case(actions: DriverActions):
    with step("[Action] Drag //XCUIElementTypeOther[@name=\"AIReplaceViewController\"]/XCUIElementTypeOther[2]/XCUIElementTypeScrollView/XCUIElementTypeOther[1]/XCUIElementTypeImage/XCUIElementTypeOther[1]/XCUIElementTypeOther[2] (19.4%,49.3%) → //XCUIElementTypeOther[@name=\"AIReplaceViewController\"]/XCUIElementTypeOther[2]/XCUIElementTypeScrollView/XCUIElementTypeOther[1]/XCUIElementTypeImage (73.4%,82.8%)"):
        actions.drag_within_elements(AppiumBy.XPATH, '//XCUIElementTypeOther[@name="AIReplaceViewController"]/XCUIElementTypeOther[2]/XCUIElementTypeScrollView/XCUIElementTypeOther[1]/XCUIElementTypeImage/XCUIElementTypeOther[1]/XCUIElementTypeOther[2]', 19.4, 49.3, AppiumBy.XPATH, '//XCUIElementTypeOther[@name="AIReplaceViewController"]/XCUIElementTypeOther[2]/XCUIElementTypeScrollView/XCUIElementTypeOther[1]/XCUIElementTypeImage', 73.4, 82.8, duration=1.0)
    assert True
